nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Message
nodes.notes: SETUP: This webhook receives chat messages from your website widget, WhatsApp, or any chat platform. Expected body: { sessionId, message, customerEmail (optional), customerName (optional) }. Integrate with Crisp, Tidio, or a custom chat widget.

nodes.name: Parse & Detect Intent
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Add your own intent keywords. 'human' intent triggers escalation to a real agent.

nodes.name: Wants Human Agent?
nodes.notes: If customer explicitly asks for a human, skip AI and escalate immediately.

values.content:
You are a helpful customer support agent for [REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME]. 

About us: [REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_DESCRIPTION]

Business hours: [REPLACE_WITH_HOURS]
Contact email: [REPLACE_WITH_EMAIL]
Contact phone: [REPLACE_WITH_PHONE]
Website: [REPLACE_WITH_WEBSITE]

FAQ:
- [REPLACE_WITH_FAQ_1]
- [REPLACE_WITH_FAQ_2]
- [REPLACE_WITH_FAQ_3]

Rules:
1. Be friendly, concise, and helpful
2. If you don't know something, say so and offer to connect them with a human
3. Never make up information
4. Always end with an offer to help further
5. Keep responses under 150 words
6. If the customer seems frustrated, show empathy first

nodes.name: AI Response (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: SETUP: Add OpenAI API credentials. CUSTOMIZE: Edit the system prompt with your company info and FAQ. Using gpt-4o-mini to keep costs low (~$0.0001 per message).

nodes.name: Escalation Response
nodes.notes: Generates a polite escalation message and triggers a notification to the support team.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Live Chat Escalation - Customer Needs Human Agent

nodes.name: Alert Support Team
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace with support team email. Could also be extended to send a Slack/Telegram notification instead.

nodes.name: Package AI Reply
nodes.notes: Extracts the text from OpenAI's response format.

nodes.name: Log Conversation
nodes.notes: Logs all conversations for review and training. SETUP: Create 'Chat_Log' tab in your Google Sheet.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, reply: $json.reply, sessionId: $json.sessionId, escalated: $json.escalated }) }}

nodes.name: Send Chat Response
nodes.notes: Returns the bot reply to the chat widget/platform.

motionElevation.description: AI-powered customer support chatbot. Detects intent, answers common questions using GPT-4o-mini, escalates to humans when requested, and logs all conversations.
